title: Skip human approval gate for dry-run export migration runs

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing behavior change: bypass approval stage when dry_run=true to avoid HITL wait states being marked FAILED by local runtime. Non-dry-run execution will still require approval.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented dry-run short-circuit before approval stage. dry_run=true now returns planned output without Human.approve, while live runs still require approval. Validated YAML parse + YAML loader test.
